detail.playbackUnavailableMsg: An kasa ƙirƙirar hanyar sake kallo mai aminci. Da fatan a sake gwadawa daga baya.
detail.exportRequestedMsg: An aika neman fitarwarka don dubawa.
detail.deletionRequestedMsg: An aika neman gogewarka don dubawa. Ana iya dakatar da gogewa idan akwai jinkirin rikici.
detail.requestUnavailableMsg: An kasa ƙirƙirar wannan buƙatar rikodi. Da fatan a sake gwadawa daga baya.
detail.name: Suna
detail.upgradeReplay: Haɓaka don sake kallon wannan shawarar cikin aminci.
detail.playbackHint: Wannan hanyar sake kallo mai aminci tana ƙarewa kai tsaye.

success.title: An tabbatar da rijista

list.title: Saƙonni

call.recordPromptMessage: Rikodi na zaɓi ne. Za a kunna shi ne kawai idan kai da likitanka kuka yarda.
call.doctorRequestedMessage: Za ka iya ƙi sannan ka ci gaba da shawarar. Rikodi yana buƙatar yardar bangarorin biyu.
call.speaker: Lasifika

wallet.title: Walata
wallet.emptyDescription: Ƙarin kuɗinka da biyanka za su bayyana nan.
wallet.customAmountPlaceholder: Ko shigar da adadin da kake so
wallet.secureNote: Mai tsaro ta Paystack · kati, canja wuri & USSD
wallet.dvaIntro: Canja kowane adadi zuwa wannan asusun za a sa kuɗi a walatarka kai tsaye.
wallet.accountUnavailable: Lambar asusu ba ta samuwa yanzu.

list.title: Takardun magani
list.emptyDescription: Takardun magani da likitanka ya bayar bayan shawara za su bayyana nan.

detail.requestRefillMessage: A aika buƙatar sake cikawa zuwa likitanka don wannan takardar magani?
detail.title: Takardar magani
detail.noRefillsLeft: Babu sauran sake cikawar da aka ba da izini a wannan takardar magani.
detail.verifyTitle: An sa hannu ta dijital & ana iya tabbatarwa
detail.verifySub: Yana ɗauke da sa hannun Ed25519. PDF ɗin ya haɗa da lambar QR da kowa zai iya bincika don tabbatar da sahihanci.

emr.title: Bayanan lafiya
emr.noAllergies: Babu rashin lafiyan jikin da aka rubuta.
emr.noConditions: Babu yanayin lafiyar da aka rubuta.
emr.noVaccinations: Babu alurar riga-kafin da aka rubuta.
emr.downloadRecordsSub: Fayil ɗin FHIR mai ɗaukuwa da za ka iya raba da kowane asibiti
emr.disclaimer: Likitocin da ka yi rijistar shawara da su kawai za su iya duba bayananka.
emr.uploadHint: Rahotannin dakin gwaje-gwaje, na'urar daukar hoto, takardun magani — PDF ko hoto.

profileEdit.imageTooLargeMessage: Da fatan zaɓi hoto ƙasa da 1MB, ko ka yanke shi ƙarami sannan ka sake gwadawa.

appearance.title: Kamanni
appearance.subtitle: Zaɓi yadda Doctium zai bayyana. Zaɓin bin na'urar yana bin wayarka kai tsaye.

dark.title: Duhu
dark.sub: Shuɗi mai duhu — mai sauƙi ga idanu

triage.disclaimer: Jagorar lafiya ce, ba ganewar asibiti ba. Idan akwai gaggawa kira 112.

urgency.manageableAtHome: Ana iya sarrafa shi a gida

voice.notCaught: Ban ji ba — danna makirufo ka sake gwadawa.
voice.unreachable: An kasa isa ga Leenah. Duba haɗinka ka sake gwadawa.
voice.autoSend: Ana aikawa cikin {{seconds}}s · danna don gyara
voice.hintAutoSend: yana aikawa kai tsaye idan ka dakata

chat.title: Tambayi {{name}}
chat.talkToDoctor: Yi magana da likita game da wannan

setup.title: Yaya {{name}} za ta taimaka yau?
setup.subtitle: {{name}} ita ce mataimakiyar lafiya ta AI ta Doctium — tana jagora, likitocinka su yanke shawara.
setup.triageSub: Tambayoyi kaɗan, sannan mu nuna maka kulawar da ta dace.
setup.qaSub: Bayanan lafiya na gaba-ɗaya — cututtuka, rigakafi, abinci mai gina jiki.
setup.readAloudSub: {{name}} tana karanta kowace amsa — yana taimakawa idan karatu yana da wuya.
setup.quotaLeft: {{remaining}} daga {{limit}} {{unit}} sun rage yau · mara iyaka da DoctiumPlus

verdict.programSub: Bin diddigi da dubawa na ci gaba don {{condition}}

settings.title: Saitunan {{name}}
settings.introSub: Ana ajiye waɗannan zaɓuɓɓukan kuma ana amfani da su duk lokacin da ka yi hira da {{name}}.
settings.speakBackSub: Tana karanta kowace amsa da ƙarfi — yana taimakawa idan karatu yana da wuya.
settings.voiceHint: Za ka kuma iya danna lasifika a kowace amsa don jin wannan saƙon kawai.
settings.languageHint: {{name}} tana fara kowace hira da wannan harshe. "Auto" yana barin ta ta bi harshen da kake rubutu da shi.

clips.youtubeCantPlay: Wannan bidiyon ba zai iya kunnawa nan ba
clips.disclaimer: Don ilimi kawai — ba ganewar asibiti ba. Ga likita don shawara.
clips.subtitle: Ilimin lafiya daga likitocin da aka tabbatar
clips.empty: Babu kayan kallo tukuna. Sake dubawa nan ba da daɗewa ba.

report.thanks: Na gode — ƙungiyarmu za ta duba wannan kayan kallon.
report.title: Bayar da rahoton wannan kayan kallo
report.hint: Me ya sa kake bayar da rahoto? Ƙungiyar Doctium za ta duba shi.

comments.title: Sharhi
comments.beFirst: Ka zama na farko da zai yi sharhi
comments.disabled: An kashe sharhi don wannan kayan kallon

support.title: Taimakon Doctium
support.replyTime: Yawanci muna amsawa cikin kwana ɗaya
support.empty: Aiko mana da saƙo — tambayoyi, matsaloli, kowane abu. Muna nan don taimako.

subscription.cancelMessage: Amfanin ka zai ci gaba da aiki har ƙarshen lokacin yanzu. Ci gaba?
subscription.introBody: Shiga DoctiumPlus don shawarwarin da aka haɗa, ragin memba da kulawar fifiko gare ka da danginka.
subscription.footNote: Za ka iya sokewa kowane lokaci. Yana sabuntawa kai tsaye kowane wata.
subscription.payWithCardSub: Yana sabunta kai tsaye kowane wata · mai tsaro ta Paystack
subscription.payFromWalletSub: Yana amfani da ragowar kuɗin walatar Doctium ɗinka

list.title: Shirye-shiryen kulawa
list.enrollError: An kasa shiga. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
list.noReadings: Babu karatu tukuna — danna don shigar da na farko
list.disclaimer: Shirye-shiryen kulawa suna tallafawa — amma ba sa maye gurbin — likitanka. Idan ba ka da lafiya, yi rijistar shawara ko nemi kulawar gaggawa nan take.
list.genotypeBody: {{program}} yana keɓance manufofi da dubawa bisa genotype. Ana ajiye shi a bayanan lafiya kuma.
list.genotypeSkip: Ban tabbata ba — ci gaba ba tare da shi ba

detail.title: Shirin kulawa
detail.riskLowTip: Ci gaba da abin da kake yi.
detail.riskModerateTip: Mai da hankali kan ruwa, ɗumi da magungunanka yau.
detail.riskHighTip: Sha ruwa akai-akai, huta ka kuma kasance da ɗumi. Jagoran kulawarka ma na iya ganin wannan.
detail.riskCriticalTip: Ka kula sosai yau. Idan ciwo ya fara, ko kana da ciwon ƙirji ko wahalar numfashi, nemi kulawa nan take.
detail.triggerOverexertion: Wuce gona da iri na ƙoƙari
detail.crisisLoggedCritical: An rubuta rikici — an sanar da jagoran kulawarka. Idan ciwonka yana da tsanani, ko kana da ciwon ƙirji ko wahalar numfashi, nemi kulawar gaggawa yanzu.
detail.crisisLoggedWarning: An rubuta rikici — an sanar da jagoran kulawarka. Ka kula da kanka.
detail.labSavedFlagged: An ajiye sakamako — wasu ƙimomi suna buƙatar kulawar likitanka, kuma an sanar da jagoran kulawarka. Kar ka canja kashin maganinka da kanka.
detail.labSaved: An ajiye sakamakon dakin gwaje-gwaje kuma an raba da jagoran kulawarka.
detail.gladItsOver: Na yi farin ciki da ya ƙare
detail.markResolved: A nuna wannan rikicin a matsayin warware?
detail.leaveMessage: Za ka iya sake shiga kowane lokaci. Karatunka zai kasance a bayananka.
detail.expectedReadings: An rubuta {{done}} daga {{expected}} karatun da ake tsammani
detail.goalStartTracking: Shigar da karatu don fara bin diddigi
detail.crisisEmpty: Babu rikicin da aka rubuta. Idan ya faru, rubuta shi nan — tarihin abubuwan da ke janyo shi yana taimaka wa jagoran kulawarka ya keɓance shirinka.
detail.hospitalizedTag: an kwantar da shi a asibiti
detail.hydroxyureaDose: Hydroxyurea {{dose}} mg/rana — ka sha shi daidai yadda aka rubuta.
detail.labsEmpty: Babu sakamakon gwaji tukuna. Bayan gwajin jininka na gaba (CBC), shigar da sakamako nan domin jagoran kulawarka ya iya sa ido kan maganinka cikin aminci.
detail.enterBothNumbers: Shigar da lambobi biyu, misali 120 da 80.
detail.crisisIntro: Mun yi haƙuri da abin da kake fuskanta. Rubutu cikin sauri yana faɗakar da jagoran kulawarka kuma yana gina hoton abubuwan da ke janyo maka rikici.
detail.whatTriggered: Me kake tsammani ya janyo shi?
detail.wentToHospital: Na je asibiti ko cibiyar kiwon lafiya
detail.whatHelped: Me ya taimaka? misali ruwa, magungunan ciwo (na zaɓi)
detail.labCopyValues: Kwafi ƙimomin daga rahoton gwajin jininka (CBC) — cika waɗanda kake da su.
detail.labSafetyNote: Kar ka taɓa canja kashin maganinka bisa sakamako kaɗai — jagoran kulawarka yana duba kowane shiga.

subPatients.title: Dangi
subPatients.emptyDescription: Ƙara dangi don yin rijistar alkawura a madadinsu.

invite.title: Gayyaci abokai
invite.shareMessage: Shiga ni a Doctium — likitoci masu inganci, kai tsaye daga wayarka! Yi rajista da lambar gayyatata {{code}} ka yi rijistar shawararka ta farko. {{link}}
invite.heroSubEarn: Ana biyan ka idan aboki ya yi rajista da lambarka ya yi rijistar shawararsa ta farko.
invite.heroSubShare: Abokan da suka yi rajista da lambarka suna taimaka wa al'ummarmu ta girma.
invite.step1: Raba lambarka ko hanyarka da abokai da dangi.
invite.step2: Suna yin rajista da lambarka a shafin rajista.
invite.step3Earn: Lokacin da suka yi rijista suka biya don shawararsu ta farko, {{amount}} zai shiga walatarka.
invite.step3: Lokacin da suka yi rijista suka biya don shawararsu ta farko, kyautarka za ta shiga walatarka.

favorites.title: Likitocin da aka fi so
favorites.emptyTitle: Babu waɗanda aka fi so tukuna
favorites.emptyText: Danna zuciya a kan kowane likita don ajiye shi nan don saurin samu.

referrals.title: Tura ni
referrals.emptyText: Idan likita ya tura ka zuwa gwani, zai bayyana nan domin ka iya yin rijista da danna ɗaya.
referrals.bookedNote: An yi rijistar alkawari — duba alkawuranka.

reviews.title: Ra'ayoyina
reviews.emptyDescription: Bayan shawara da aka kammala, za ka iya kimanta likitanka kuma ra'ayoyinka za su bayyana nan.

notifications.title: Sanarwa
notifications.emptyDesc: Sabuntawa game da alkawuranka, takardun magani da kulawa za su bayyana nan.

surveys.title: Kimanta ziyarorinka
surveys.emptyDesc: Bayan shawara za mu tambaya yadda ta kasance. Binciken da ke jiran amsa zai bayyana nan.
surveys.npsQuestion: Yaya yiwuwar ka ba da shawarar wannan likitan ga aboki ko dangi?
surveys.bookAgainQuestion: Za ka sake yin rijistar wannan likitan?
surveys.commentPlaceholder: Akwai wani abu da kake son ƙarawa? (na zaɓi)
surveys.npsLow: Ba zai yiwu ba ko kaɗan

insights.title: Fahimtar lafiya
insights.emptyDesc: Yanayin lafiyarka zai bayyana nan bayan shawararka ta farko.

careReminders.title: Tunatarwar kulawa
careReminders.emptyDesc: Dubawa da tunatarwar bibiya daga likitocinka za su bayyana nan bayan shawara.

help.title: Taimako & tallafi
help.heading: Yaya za mu taimaka?
help.subheading: Bincika tambayoyin gama-gari ko isa ga ƙungiyar tallafin kulawarmu.
help.faqBookA: Buɗe bayanin likita, danna "Yi rijistar alkawari", zaɓi nau'in shawara, zaɓi kwanan wata da lokaci, sannan ka tabbatar ka biya.
help.faqPrivateA: Eh. An ɓoye duk shawarwari da saƙonni kuma na sirri ne, kai da likitanka kawai ke iya samun su.
help.faqVideoA: A lokacin alkawarinka, buɗe alkawarin ka danna "Shiga kiran bidiyo". Tabbatar kana da haɗin intanet mai ƙarfi.
help.faqRxA: Bayan shawararka, likitanka na iya bayar da takardar magani ta dijital wadda za ta bayyana a cikin bayanan alkawarinka.
help.faqCancelQ: Yaya zan soke ko sake tsarawa?
help.faqCancelA: Buɗe alkawarin daga shafin Alkawura ka danna "Soke alkawari". Mayar da kuɗi yana bin manufar sokewarmu.
